name: Disaster Draught
descrip: A unique drink that applies a myriad of detrimental, kinky effects to the one who drinks it! The benefits? Fun!♥
useOutcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Charm|n||f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Perfumed Waltz|n||f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|DrowsyDreamer|n||f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Spank|n||f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|ParalysisFull|n|[AttackerName] drinks the undescribably odd-tasting, strangely bitter beverage... and [AttackerHisOrHer] tastebuds' discontent is instantly washed away as its effects hit [AttackerHimOrHer] all at once in a shuddering, mind-numbing wave!
